title: Latest open artifacts (#21): Open model bonanza! Gemma 4, DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2.6, MiMo 2.5, GLM-5.1 & others. On CAISI's V4 assessment.
reason: Multiple new open model weights released, directly actionable for builders to download, evaluate, and deploy.
post_text: Gemma 4, DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2.6, MiMo 2.5, GLM-5.1, and other open models were released. Builders can now evaluate these new weights for deployment or fine-tuning to improve performance or reduce costs.
source_angle: Tracking new open model releases and their implications for builders.

title: Recent Developments in LLM Architectures: KV Sharing, mHC, and Compressed Attention
reason: New open-weight LLMs (Gemma 4, DeepSeek V4) implement cost-saving long-context architectures.
post_text: Gemma 4 and DeepSeek V4 integrate KV Sharing, mHC, and Compressed Attention. Builders can leverage these open-weight models to reduce long-context inference costs.
source_angle: Analysis of open-weight LLM architectures for long-context cost reduction.

title: OpenAI and Malta partner to bring ChatGPT Plus to all citizens
reason: Fails Ships Test. Partnership for existing product distribution, not new builder tool, API, or weights for developers.
source_angle: OpenAI partners Malta for ChatGPT Plus access
